title: koenigia filicaulis var. caespitosa
intro: Koenigia filicaulis var. caespitosa, also known as the Himalayan rockjasmine or rockjasmine, is a plant species in the family Polygonaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Koenigia filicaulis var. caespitosa can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats.
